Should not be relieved after completion of duty. Also, the instructions of the Election Commission

3. Since the above employees are transferred on request, they have to travel and take charge.
Time will not be allowed.
4. For any reason without the prior permission of the Government to the employees concerned.
Leave should not be granted. Also, as per Rule-30 (c) of the M.N.S. (Leave) Rules, 1981
Accept any leave applications of engineers transferred by the parent office.
If such applications are received, they must be registered at the original address of the employee concerned.

If sent, these items will not be taken into consideration.
